reference_nearest_label: Which labeled point has "{target_axis_label}" closest to {target_axis_value}?
Find the point label whose "{target_axis_label}" value is nearest to {target_axis_value}.
Which point is closest to {target_axis_value} on the "{target_axis_label}" axis?
Compare the labeled points by "{target_axis_label}". Which one is nearest to {target_axis_value}?
What label marks the point with "{target_axis_label}" value closest to {target_axis_value}?
increase: Which series has the greatest increase in z-axis value from the first x-axis position to the last?
Compare each series from its first x-axis point to its last x-axis point. Which has the greatest increase in z-axis value?
What series label shows the largest first-to-last increase in z-axis value?
From the first x-axis position to the last, which series has the strongest z-axis increase?
Which labeled series increases the most in z-axis value between the first and last x-axis positions?
decrease: Which series has the greatest decrease in z-axis value from the first x-axis position to the last?
Compare each series from its first x-axis point to its last x-axis point. Which has the greatest decrease in z-axis value?
What series label shows the largest first-to-last decrease in z-axis value?
From the first x-axis position to the last, which series has the strongest z-axis decrease?
Which labeled series decreases the most in z-axis value between the first and last x-axis positions?
panel_variation_label: Which panel has the largest z-axis value range?
Compare the panels by z-axis value range. Which panel has the largest range?
What panel label has the largest spread of z-axis values?
Find the panel with the largest z-axis range.
Which small 3D chart panel shows the largest z-axis value range?

query:reference_nearest_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible point label as a string
query:reference_nearest_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the selected point marker

query:increase.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible series label as a string
query:increase.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] connecting the first and last marker centers of the answer series

query:decrease.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible series label as a string
query:decrease.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] connecting the first and last marker centers of the answer series

query:panel_variation_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible panel label as a string
query:panel_variation_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected panel
